title: Obstacle Course Builder
description: A design-then-run activity that coaches children through building a safe household obstacle course and completing each movement station.
learningGoals: Plan and build before beginning a physical activity
Practice climbing, crawling, jumping, balancing, and carrying
Use simple safety checks during creative risk play
Invent and revise a course using household materials
interactionModel: follow spoken build and run stations in the real world, using large completed-step controls and individual timers
feedbackModel: construction and race-announcer voice coaching with sparkle/tick/tada SFX; safety checks are framed as professional protocols

modes.title: Build It
modes.skill: planning, course design, and safety checks

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
